name: Liang Shao
page_title: Liang Shao 粱紹 [Han] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Liang Shao held rank as Court Architect during the Han dynasty. During the struggle between Li Jue and Guo Si, Liang Shao was taken hostage. Later on, he accompanied the Emperor in escaping from Chang’an. Liang Shao continued to serve the Han when Cao Cao took over. Despite not being a eunuch, Liang Shao was allowed to take charge of the Empress’ residence in Xu. Yuan Shao hated Liang Shao and beseeched Cao Cao to have him killed. However, Cao Cao would not oblige. Presumably, Liang Shao continued serving until his eventual death.

sections.short-biography: Had arguments with Yuan Shao and held hostage by Li Jue. Held eunuch rank yet was a man.

full_text:
Liang Shao 粱紹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liang Shao (粱紹). Had arguments with Yuan Shao and held hostage by Li Jue. Held eunuch rank yet was a man. Liang Shao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Liang Shao held rank as Court Architect during the Han dynasty. During the struggle between Li Jue and Guo Si, Liang Shao was taken hostage. Later on, he accompanied the Emperor in escaping from Chang’an. Liang Shao continued to serve the Han when Cao Cao took over. Despite not being a eunuch, Liang Shao was allowed to take charge of the Empress’ residence in Xu. Yuan Shao hated Liang Shao and beseeched Cao Cao to have him killed. However, Cao Cao would not oblige. Presumably, Liang Shao continued serving until his eventual death.
